## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Adventures Group and GrowthX to discuss SEO strategy, blog performance, and next steps for optimization.](https://fathom.video/share/34QxmBv2C-sADRs-V-XymLvuWHp_gZg7?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Organic traffic and conversions are key metrics to track overall SEO performance](https://fathom.video/share/34QxmBv2C-sADRs-V-XymLvuWHp_gZg7?tab=summary&timestamp=1023.0)
  - [Banner implementation on high-performing blog posts planned, with future development of a reusable component](https://fathom.video/share/34QxmBv2C-sADRs-V-XymLvuWHp_gZg7?tab=summary&timestamp=1293.0)
  - [New GrowthX team member (20+ years SEO experience, ex-TripAdvisor) to join future meetings](https://fathom.video/share/34QxmBv2C-sADRs-V-XymLvuWHp_gZg7?tab=summary&timestamp=1181.0)
  - [Cross-domain UTM tracking needed for articles referencing multiple Adventure Group sites](https://fathom.video/share/34QxmBv2C-sADRs-V-XymLvuWHp_gZg7?tab=summary&timestamp=1525.0)

## Topics

### SEO Performance Analysis

  - [Click-through rates (CTR) improving across destinations (Vallarta, Cabo)](https://fathom.video/share/34QxmBv2C-sADRs-V-XymLvuWHp_gZg7?tab=summary&timestamp=189.0)
  - [Cabo showing 9% CTR, considered very good](https://fathom.video/share/34QxmBv2C-sADRs-V-XymLvuWHp_gZg7?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Significant traffic spike observed for one article, followed by stabilization](https://fathom.video/share/34QxmBv2C-sADRs-V-XymLvuWHp_gZg7?tab=summary&timestamp=712.0)
  - [Kyle suggested analyzing queries in Google Search Console to understand traffic drivers](https://fathom.video/share/34QxmBv2C-sADRs-V-XymLvuWHp_gZg7?tab=summary&timestamp=834.0)

### Content Optimization Strategy

  - [Plan to add banners to top-performing articles with trip planning intent](https://fathom.video/share/34QxmBv2C-sADRs-V-XymLvuWHp_gZg7?tab=summary&timestamp=277.0)
  - [Identified opportunity to expand "Puerto Vallarta travel tips" with more content and keywords](https://fathom.video/share/34QxmBv2C-sADRs-V-XymLvuWHp_gZg7?tab=summary&timestamp=335.0)
  - [Proposal to develop blog content around underperforming tours to boost sales](https://fathom.video/share/34QxmBv2C-sADRs-V-XymLvuWHp_gZg7?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)

### Technical Implementation

  - [Google Tag Manager events preferred over UTMs for internal link tracking](https://fathom.video/share/34QxmBv2C-sADRs-V-XymLvuWHp_gZg7?tab=summary&timestamp=396.0)
  - [Development team to create reusable banner component with built-in event tracking](https://fathom.video/share/34QxmBv2C-sADRs-V-XymLvuWHp_gZg7?tab=summary&timestamp=1344.0)
  - [H2 tags and paragraph spacing fixes in progress with development team](https://fathom.video/share/34QxmBv2C-sADRs-V-XymLvuWHp_gZg7?tab=summary&timestamp=1405.0)

### Content Calendar

  - [April articles for Vallarta and Cabo pending approval](https://fathom.video/share/34QxmBv2C-sADRs-V-XymLvuWHp_gZg7?tab=summary&timestamp=206.0)
  - [May content to be sent for review this week](https://fathom.video/share/34QxmBv2C-sADRs-V-XymLvuWHp_gZg7?tab=summary&timestamp=1464.0)
  - ["Mexican vacation spots" article approved, cross-linking strategy discussed](https://fathom.video/share/34QxmBv2C-sADRs-V-XymLvuWHp_gZg7?tab=summary&timestamp=1525.0)

### Analytics and Reporting

  - [Challenges with GA4 for user journey metrics noted](https://fathom.video/share/34QxmBv2C-sADRs-V-XymLvuWHp_gZg7?tab=summary&timestamp=1077.0)
  - [Team to focus on broader metrics first, then drill down into finer user behaviors](https://fathom.video/share/34QxmBv2C-sADRs-V-XymLvuWHp_gZg7?tab=summary&timestamp=1023.0)
  - [Revenue by tour analysis to inform content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/34QxmBv2C-sADRs-V-XymLvuWHp_gZg7?tab=summary&timestamp=1235.0)

### Administrative

  - [Invoice tracking discussed; 30-day payment terms confirmed](https://fathom.video/share/34QxmBv2C-sADRs-V-XymLvuWHp_gZg7?tab=summary&timestamp=1767.0)
  - [Team to follow up on February invoice status](https://fathom.video/share/34QxmBv2C-sADRs-V-XymLvuWHp_gZg7?tab=summary&timestamp=1767.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Isabel to have team add banners to specified high-performing articles](https://fathom.video/share/34QxmBv2C-sADRs-V-XymLvuWHp_gZg7?tab=summary&timestamp=1293.0)
  - [Mariana to keep monitoring article performance trends (3+ week timeframe)](https://fathom.video/share/34QxmBv2C-sADRs-V-XymLvuWHp_gZg7?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
  - [Kyle to provide example UTM structure for cross-domain tracking](https://fathom.video/share/34QxmBv2C-sADRs-V-XymLvuWHp_gZg7?tab=summary&timestamp=1525.0)
